column1: # Warden starter policy — INERT BY DEFAULT.
# Warden is deny-by-default: with no grants for a principal, every request from
# it is denied. This starter intentionally grants NOTHING to your agent
# ("claude-code-main"), so flipping to enforce never silently authorizes a broad
# surface. Add your own project roots below, deliberately, before enforcing.
# Example — grant your agent read+write to ONE project (uncomment and edit; use a
# real absolute path and the narrowest root that works). Prefer several specific
# roots over one broad one like your whole home directory:
# Required by the bundled end-to-end self-test. Harmless: grants read only to the
# self-test fixture directory the installer seeds under ~/.warden. The $HOME token
# is expanded at load time. Leave this in place.
